backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing contact form submission (publicly accessible), contact request retrieval (admin-only), and user profile management with role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed requirements: changing footer background to white, updating footer text colors for readability, and preserving existing footer styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, styles, and utilities, describing the landing page structure with header, hero, features, about, contact, and footer sections using terracotta/earth tone color scheme.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: IC assets configuration allowing the .well-known directory to be served for domain verification.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode color tokens for UI components, including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, title "Your trusted, on-the-ground Real state team", and Google Fonts preconnect for Playfair Display and Inter fonts.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: IC domain verification file listing myplaceatqueretaro.com and www.myplaceatqueretaro.com as authorized domains.
frontend/public/robots.txt: SEO-friendly robots.txt allowing Googlebot, Bingbot, PerplexityBot, and all other crawlers to access all paths.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component composing the single-page landing layout with LandingHeader, HeroSection, FeaturesSection, AboutSection, ContactSection, ScheduleConsultationSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying company description, trust indicators (36+ years experience, 500+ clients/year, 98% satisfaction), and about-us-image.jpg in a two-column grid layout.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Native HTML contact form component submitting directly to Formspree with required fields (name, email, phone, message) and 44px minimum touch targets for accessibility.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section combining ContactForm with business details (phone, email, location), social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), and displaying "Contact us" heading.
Displays a 'Why Choose Us' section with four feature cards (Premium Accommodations, Prime Locations, Trusted Service, Personalized Experience) and a YouTube video link.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with logo, quick navigation links, legal links, copyright notice, and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background image, headline about Querétaro, call-to-action buttons for 'Start Your Journey' and 'Learn More', and an animated scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/LandingHeader.ts: Fixed header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menus, and a 'Book' button; includes scroll-based styling and mobile menu toggle functionality.
frontend/src/components/ScheduleConsulta: Section for scheduling a free discovery call with a 'Book' button that dynamically loads and displays a Calendly inline widget when clicked.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages a backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing identity state and login status throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitContactReque: File appears to be empty or contains only whitespace.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm terracotta and earth-toned color scheme inspired by Querétaro's colonial architecture, including light and dark mode variants for all UI elements.
frontend/src/lib/scrollToSection.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls to a section by ID with automatic header height offset calculation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, custom fonts (Inter and Playfair Display), shadows, animations, and responsive breakpoints.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting three completed features related to updating footer styling from dark (bg-gray-800) to white background with readable dark text colors.
